request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that cutting defense spending by even 5% could leave our allies vulnerable? As a young man who values duty and order, you understand that national security isn't just about us—it's about our commitments. A strong defense budget means we keep our word to allies and deter threats before they reach our shores. #StandWithAllies #DutyFirst
